allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import flask; import pandas; import numpy; print\(''OK''\)")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
from doctor_app import discover_presets, get_preset_metadata, load_doctor_settings
import json

presets = discover_presets\(\)
print\('Presets found:', len\(presets\)\)
for p in presets[:3]:
    print\(' -', p['name'], '|', p['target_count'], 'targets'\)

print\(\)
if presets:
    meta = get_preset_metadata\(presets[0]['run_path']\)
    if meta:
        print\('Feature count:', len\(meta['features']\)\)
        print\('Targets:', [t['name'] for t in meta['targets']]\)
        print\(\)
        print\('Sample features:'\)
        for f in meta['features'][:6]:
            print\(f'  {f[\\"name\\"]:40s} type={f[\\"type\\"]:10s} group={f[\\"group\\"]}'\)
" 2>&1)
